Name: Summer Analyst Training Programme
Company Description: AmplifyME is a financial technology and education company that provides simulation based training programs for universities and investment banks. Founded in 2016 and based in London, the firm uses proprietary software to replicate real world trading environments and investment decision making processes. AmplifyME is known for bridging the gap between academic theory and professional practice by offering experiential learning tools to students and new hires. It partners with global financial institutions and academic partners to identify talent and improve technical literacy across the financial services industry.

Name: Trader/Analyst Intern (London) - Summer 2027
Company Description: The D.E. Shaw Group is a global investment and technology development firm known for its quantitative and discretionary investment strategies. Founded in 1988 and headquartered in New York, it manages capital across hedge fund, private credit, and venture strategies for institutional investors. D.E. Shaw combines advanced mathematical modelling, data science, and proprietary technology in its investment approach, and attracts talent from both financial and scientific backgrounds. The firm is one of the most prominent quantitative hedge funds in the industry.

Name: International Equities Associate – Intern
Company Description: Citadel is a global financial institution operating one of the world’s largest and most successful hedge funds, alongside a leading market-making business through Citadel Securities. Founded in 1990 by Kenneth Griffin and headquartered in Miami, the firm manages capital across equities, credit, commodities, and global macro strategies. Citadel is known for its research-intensive, data-driven approach and emphasis on risk management. It attracts top talent in quantitative research, software engineering, and investment analysis across its global offices.

Name: Quantitative Researcher, Intern (Summer 2027)
Company Description: Aquatic Capital Management is a Chicago-based quantitative investment firm specializing in systematic strategies that combine rigorous quantitative research, robust software engineering, and disciplined risk management to generate consistent, repeatable returns. Registered with the SEC and CFTC and managing approximately $5.5 billion in assets as of March 2024, the firm advises private funds grouped into structured “master/feeder” models and employs a unified, collaborative approach to trading.

Name: Summer Internship
Company Description: EDF Trading is the wholesale market arm of EDF Group, managing the procurement, optimisation, and trading of power, gas, LNG, and environmental products. Operating across Europe, Asia, and North America, it offers services to both EDF affiliates and third-party clients. The firm plays a crucial role in balancing energy systems, supporting renewable integration, and offering risk management products in increasingly volatile markets. EDF Trading operates at the intersection of physical energy and financial market strategies.

Name: 2027 Quant Trading Intern
Company Description: Da Vinci Trading is a proprietary trading firm based in Amsterdam, specialising in market making and high-frequency trading. The firm operates in electronic markets across asset classes, using technology-driven strategies to provide liquidity and execute trades at scale. Founded by former traders from major financial institutions, Da Vinci combines quantitative research with in-house systems development. It maintains a flat structure and meritocratic culture, with a focus on innovation and performance in fast-moving markets.
Notes: If you applied in January, re-apply now

Name: Campus Quantitative Trader (Intern)
Company Description: Jump Trading is a proprietary trading firm and technology company based in Chicago, known for its expertise in algorithmic and high-frequency trading across global financial markets. Founded in 1999, the firm trades a broad range of asset classes including equities, fixed income, futures, options, and cryptocurrencies, operating on over 100 exchanges worldwide. Jump places a strong emphasis on quantitative research, advanced hardware and software development, and low-latency infrastructure, competing with firms such as DRW, Citadel Securities, and Jane Street. It is also involved in crypto through Jump Crypto, a dedicated division focused on trading, venture investments, and protocol development. The firm is privately held and secretive, known for its flat structure, highly selective hiring, and deep investment in proprietary technology and applied science.

Name: Women in Trading Insight Programme - 2027
Company Description: GSA Capital is a London-based quantitative trading firm that runs systematic strategies across global equity, futures, and FX markets. Originally formed in 2005 as a spinout from Deutsche Bank, the firm has since established itself as a low-profile but consistently high-performing player in the quant space. GSA focuses on exploiting short- to medium-term statistical patterns in large datasets, applying rigorous academic research, machine learning, and proprietary execution systems to gain a trading edge. The firm has also explored longer-horizon signals and fundamental data, expanding its portfolio of strategies while maintaining its data-first philosophy. With a culture built around research integrity and risk discipline, GSA hires selectively and fosters a collaborative environment geared towards solving complex market problems with mathematics and technology.

Name: Quantitative Trading Analyst Intern
Company Description: DRW is a diversified proprietary trading firm headquartered in Chicago, operating at the intersection of trading, technology, and quantitative research. Founded in 1992, the firm trades across asset classes including fixed income, FX, equities, and digital assets, using both systematic and discretionary strategies. DRW also invests in financial market infrastructure and early-stage technologies through its venture arm. Known for its data-centric and collaborative culture, DRW has built a strong global presence in high-frequency and options trading.

Name: GIC Internship Programme 2027
Company Description: GIC is Singapore’s sovereign wealth fund, responsible for managing the city-state’s foreign reserves with a long-term, global investment mandate. Established in 1981, GIC invests across asset classes including public equities, fixed income, private equity, real estate, infrastructure, and venture capital. With a presence in key financial hubs including New York, London, San Francisco, Beijing, and São Paulo, GIC takes a highly diversified and research-driven approach, focusing on sustainable returns over decades. The firm is known for its disciplined portfolio construction, rigorous risk management, and strong in-house macroeconomic research. GIC is also a leading investor in technology and emerging markets, and has significantly increased its focus on sustainability, climate risk, and corporate governance as part of its investment strategy. It operates independently from the Singapore government but is ultimately accountable to the Ministry of Finance.

Name: Internship Programme 2027
Company Description: Revolut is a UK-based fintech company offering digital banking, payments, foreign exchange, and personal finance services through a mobile-first platform. Founded in 2015, the company has expanded rapidly, serving tens of millions of users across Europe, North America, and Asia-Pacific. Its app provides features such as multi-currency accounts, crypto trading, budgeting tools, and business banking, targeting both individuals and SMEs. Revolut operates under a growing number of banking licences and continues to broaden its financial product suite as it positions itself as a global challenger bank. It is one of the most valuable fintechs in Europe and continues to push into new markets and verticals.

Name: Quant Research/Trading Internship - Summer 2027
Company Description: Wincent is a London-based private investment firm focused on long-term partnerships with high-growth businesses in Europe and beyond. The firm provides flexible capital solutions, often through minority investments, to founder-led or entrepreneur-driven companies across sectors including technology, consumer, healthcare, and business services. Wincent distinguishes itself by avoiding a rigid fund structure, enabling it to take a patient, collaborative approach without exit pressure. The firm typically supports its portfolio companies with strategic input, growth planning, and network access, while allowing management teams to retain operational control. It aims to align closely with founders' goals and business values over time.
Notes: Based in Slovakia, open to students in UK

Name: 2027 Summer Analyst
Company Description: Blackstone is one of the world’s leading investment firms, specialising in private equity, real estate, credit, and infrastructure. Founded in 1985 and based in New York, the firm manages capital on behalf of pension funds, sovereign wealth funds, and individual investors. Blackstone is known for its scale, global reach, and ability to take large, complex positions across industries. It combines deep operational support with financial engineering and has a track record of building value in both private and public market investments.

Name: Summer 2027 Equity Research Associate Intern
Company Description: Fidelity Investments is one of the world’s largest asset managers and financial services providers, offering investment management, retirement services, brokerage, and financial planning to individuals, institutions, and advisors. Founded in 1946 and headquartered in Boston, Fidelity manages trillions in client assets across mutual funds, ETFs, and separately managed accounts. The firm is also a major custodian for registered investment advisers (RIAs) and operates one of the largest retail brokerage platforms in the US. Fidelity is known for its strong research capability, investor education tools, and a client-first culture that blends innovation with scale. It has been an early adopter of digital trends including zero-commission trading, fractional shares, and crypto access, while also investing heavily in AI and cloud infrastructure. Fidelity continues to be a dominant force in both institutional and retail investing, driven by long-term thinking and deep operational capacity.

Name: Quantitative Trading Internship: Summer 2027
Company Description: Susquehanna International Group is a global quantitative trading and technology firm based in the US, known for market making, proprietary trading, and quantitative research. The firm trades across asset classes including equities, options, ETFs, and fixed income, using mathematical models and high-frequency trading infrastructure. SIG is also a significant investor in venture capital through Susquehanna Growth Equity. With offices in the US, Europe, and Asia, the firm is noted for its strong internal training programs, flat structure, and heavy emphasis on probability, decision-making, and applied game theory.

Name: Quantitative Reseacher - Intern
Company Description: GSA Capital is a London-based quantitative trading firm that runs systematic strategies across global equity, futures, and FX markets. Originally formed in 2005 as a spinout from Deutsche Bank, the firm has since established itself as a low-profile but consistently high-performing player in the quant space. GSA focuses on exploiting short- to medium-term statistical patterns in large datasets, applying rigorous academic research, machine learning, and proprietary execution systems to gain a trading edge. The firm has also explored longer-horizon signals and fundamental data, expanding its portfolio of strategies while maintaining its data-first philosophy. With a culture built around research integrity and risk discipline, GSA hires selectively and fosters a collaborative environment geared towards solving complex market problems with mathematics and technology.

Name: Millennium Investment Internship 2027
Company Description: Millennium Management is a global multi-manager hedge fund founded in 1989, operating a platform of independent investment teams across asset classes and geographies. Headquartered in New York, the firm manages over $60 billion in assets and allocates capital to hundreds of portfolio managers running diverse, often uncorrelated strategies. Millennium is known for its robust risk management, proprietary infrastructure, and intense focus on performance and discipline. The firm operates offices across the US, Europe, and Asia, and competes with other multi-manager funds such as Citadel and Point72. With a highly selective hiring process and rigorous oversight model, Millennium continues to be one of the most sought-after and closely watched firms in the hedge fund industry.

Name: 2027 Internship - Quantitative Trading
Company Description: Virtu Financial is a US-based financial services firm specialising in market making, trading technology, and execution services. Headquartered in New York, Virtu operates globally across equities, fixed income, FX, and commodities, using proprietary algorithms and low-latency infrastructure. The firm provides liquidity to global markets and also offers analytics, execution tools, and workflow solutions to institutional clients. Known for its role in electronic trading and its high-speed market presence, Virtu plays a key part in maintaining efficiency and depth in modern financial markets.

Name: Trading & Research Summer Internship 2027
Company Description: Capula Investment Management is a global alternative asset manager specialising in fixed income, macro, and absolute return strategies. Founded in 2005 and headquartered in London, the firm manages capital for institutional investors such as pension funds, endowments, and sovereign wealth funds. Capula’s investment strategies are often focused on interest rate and volatility trading, and it is known for operating with a disciplined, risk-managed approach. The firm also maintains offices in Tokyo, Hong Kong, and New York.

Name: 2027 Summer Internship Program - EMEA
Company Description: BlackRock is the world’s largest asset manager, overseeing trillions in assets across index funds, ETFs, active strategies, and alternatives. Founded in 1988 and headquartered in New York, the firm serves institutional, corporate, and retail investors worldwide. Its product suite includes iShares, the world’s most widely used ETF platform, and Aladdin, its proprietary risk and portfolio management system. BlackRock plays a major role in global capital markets, with influence over long-term investment trends, ESG integration, and financial technology innovation.

Name: 2027 Academy Investment Summer Internship
Company Description: Point72 is a global asset management firm founded by Steven A. Cohen in 2014, following the transition from SAC Capital. Headquartered in Stamford, Connecticut, the firm manages capital across multiple strategies including long/short equity, macro, systematic, and private investments. Its discretionary investing teams operate with autonomy within a multi-manager platform, while its Cubist division focuses on quantitative and algorithmic trading. Point72 also runs a venture capital arm, Point72 Ventures, investing in fintech, healthcare, and enterprise technology. With offices in major financial centres including New York, London, Tokyo, and Singapore, the firm is known for its strong emphasis on data, technology, and talent development, particularly through its structured analyst training programs like the Point72 Academy.
Notes: 2-5 telephone interviews across HR and traders
